label: ServiceNow Ticket
description: Create a ServiceNow record via the REST Table API. Defaults to creating an incident; supports any configurable table (change_request, problem, etc).

settings.name: instanceUrl
settings.label: Instance URL
settings.description: ServiceNow instance base URL. Falls back to SERVICENOW_INSTANCE_URL env when unset.

settings.name: table
settings.label: Table
settings.description: ServiceNow table name (incident, change_request, problem, etc).

settings.name: fields
settings.label: Fields
settings.description: Object of field-name → value pairs. String values are templated against the workflow input.

ai.shortDescription: Create a ServiceNow record via REST Table API.
ai.whenToUse: When workflow output should land in ServiceNow as an incident, change request, or other table record.
ai.examplePrompt: open a ServiceNow incident with short_description from the alert summary
ai.promptHints: Auth uses SERVICENOW_AUTH_TOKEN (Bearer/Basic) or SERVICENOW_USERNAME + SERVICENOW_PASSWORD env vars. Reference output via {{steps.<id>.result.sysId}} and {{steps.<id>.result.number}}.

outputAssertions.name: created_ok
outputAssertions.errorMessage: ServiceNow API did not return 201 Created.
